title: Alex Jones Had Visions Of 9/11
summary: Alex Jones discusses his claimed precognitive dreams, particularly regarding the September 11, 2001 World Trade Center attacks. He references his July 2001 on-air predictions about the attacks and a subsequent call with Joe Rogan discussing these predictions.

events.description: Alex Jones claims he predicted on-air in July that the World Trade Center would be blown up and blamed on Bin Laden

key_claims.claim: Alex Jones had precognitive dreams about the World Trade Center attacks
Alex Jones publicly predicted in July 2001 that the World Trade Center would be attacked and blamed on Bin Laden
There was a famous on-air call with Joe Rogan where Alex Jones discussed his predictions about the attacks
